raw_consumer_statement:
I made an online purchase on XX/XX/XXXX in the amount of {$730.00} item was delivered at the front door. I wasnt home when the package was delivered. I did get a email stating the package was delivered. The package was stolen off front porch. I notified the company that I didnt receive the package. I was asked to notify the XXXX carrier who delivered the package which I did to complete the investigation process. The carrier notified me a few days later he delivered the package at the front door. I than proceeded to call the Macys credit card dispute department asking if they can reship my package with a signature required. On XXXX XXXX And that was declined. So at this point I asked the company if I can file an another dispute on XXXX XXXX requesting a refund since the reshipment was denied. 
I was than getting letters in the mail stating the dispute was denied. And the investigation was taking 1 to 2 billing cycles so than I proceeded to reopen the dispute and i received yet another letter stating the dispute was denied I kept reopening this same transaction and filing the dispute ever time the company denied the dispute. All the way till XXXX XXXX I kept calling every week to get the status on the dispute and I was getting the run around and being on hold for hours just to wait for a super visor to say they will look in to this and see what they can do. They would pass me over and over to another agent I would be on hold for hours.just for this not to be resolved. and that the company made there final decision and the dispute is denied. That theres nothing the can do. I told over and over Im not going to be responsible for a purchase that i didnt receive.
